sections.paragraph:
συνοψίζω 1 aor. συνώψισα (σύν + *ὀψίζω ‘to engage in seeing’, via ὄψις; PTebt 82, 2 [II b.c.]; StudPal 70 [I a.d.]; Simplicius in Aristot. Phys. 918, 13) to make a calculation, estimate, count τὰς ὥρας Hv 3, 1, 4 (v.l. συνεψήφισα). τὴν ποσότητα τῆς δαπάνης calculate the expense Hs 5, 3, 7 (some edd. συμψηφίσας).—Cp. DELG s.v. ὄπωπα.

aor. aor. = aorist

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

StudPal StudPal = CWessely, Studien zur Paläographie und Papyrusurkunden—List 4

Simplicius Simplicius , VI a.d.—List 5

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Hs Hs = Similitudes

edd. edd. = editions, editors

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 974
